accurate.why: Appropriations totals and policy riders match the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated provisions; entities and riders are in the text.

states_purpose.why: States it provides FY2025 legislative-branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: High-level summary; does not detail amendments but notes funding requirements/restrictions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes restrictions exist generally; no specific carve-outs required at this altitude.

major_provisions_covered.why: Lists all funded entities and notes use restrictions; faithful high-level coverage.

objective_tone.why: Neutral; describes DEI/marriage riders without editorializing.

concise.why: Dense but no padding given the bill's length.

correct_entities.why: Agencies (Capitol Police, AOC, LOC, GPO, GAO, CBO) named correctly.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
